name: mapper
description: An AI-powered architect and scrum master for your projects.

chatParticipants.name: mapper
chatParticipants.description: Your project's architect and scrum master.

commands.name: summary
commands.description: Generate a Daily Standup note from your recent Git commits.

commands.name: draw
commands.description: Visualize the project's architecture with a Mermaid diagram.

commands.name: trace
commands.description: Trace where a symbol is defined and referenced across the codebase.

commands.name: path
commands.description: Trace a request path from route to handler to DB/external calls.

commands.name: config
commands.description: Show configuration flow: env keys to settings to clients.

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain the role of the currently open file in the architecture.

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export the project architecture as an ARCHITECTURE.md file.

scripts.test: npx ts-node src/test/mermaid.test.ts && npx ts-node src/test/frameworkDetectors.test.ts
